title: If all subitems statuses are DONE only then the item status should be DONE
excerpt:

posts.author: trakracer (Judit Peter)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone!

I would like to set up that if I completed all of the subitems (status: done), only then the big task/item should change to done status. Now if I select one subitem to done, the main item is done too. How can I connect better the subitems with the main item?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @trakracer

Welcome to the community. This built-in automation does do that for you
